use serde::Deserialize;
use std::collections::HashMap;
use std::sync::OnceLock;

#[derive(Deserialize, Clone)]
struct RequestConfig {
    action: String,
    target: String,
    options: Options,
}

#[derive(Deserialize, Clone)]
struct Options {
    verbose: bool,
    timeout: u64,
}

static CONFIG_CACHE: OnceLock<HashMap<String, RequestConfig>> = OnceLock::new();

fn get_cached_config(key: &str) -> Option<&'static RequestConfig> {
    CONFIG_CACHE.get()?.get(key)
}

fn preparse_configs(raw: &str) -> HashMap<String, RequestConfig> {
    raw.lines()
        .filter_map(|line| {
            let config: RequestConfig = toml::from_str(line).ok()?;
            Some((config.target.clone(), config))
        })
        .collect()
}

fn handle_request(raw_config: &str) -> Result<(), Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let config: RequestConfig = toml::from_str(raw_config)?;
    process_action(&config.action, &config.target);
    Ok(())
}

fn process_action(_action: &str, _target: &str) {}
